baseline_note: Baseline corpus = 6,562 articles from the 2026-04-25 bootstrap run. Grown gold = 8117 rows (1820 in / 5737 peripheral / 560 out / 0 uncertain) after the 2026-04-26 reach audit added 1,555 classified rows. Precision and recall here are computed as if the baseline corpus were a fresh run scored against the post-growth gold (audit.py reproducibly classifies; reach growth was applied via the audit re-run + manual sweep).
